articles.title: Target Corp. stock rises Wednesday, still underperforms market
articles.summary: Shares of Target Corp. (TGT) increased by 1.06% on Wednesday, closing at $130.19. This rise occurred during a strong trading session for the broader market, with the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also seeing gains. Despite the stock's second consecutive day of increases, it still underperformed compared to the overall market performance.
